summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Combo/Stack prediction feature and AI Wizard flow. All 15 test cases passed. Owner bypass login works, 6-step wizard flow works, new 8-step combo flow works with proper state transitions.
passed_tests: Login: Owner bypass email josselj001@gmail.com goes straight to dashboard
Dashboard: Pick of the Day card visible with Alyssa Thompson
Dashboard: AI Wizard section visible with 'Step 1 of 6' indicator
Step 1: League selection works (NWSL Women league-254)
Step 2: Player search works (3+ chars required, shows results)
Step 3: Opponent selection works (shows team list)
Step 5: Prop type selection works (Shots, Saves, etc.)
Step 6: Shows 'Stack 2nd Player (Combo)' button with data-testid='stack-player-btn'
Step 7: Clicking 'Stack 2nd Player' transitions to Step 7 of 8
Step 7: Breadcrumb shows 8 steps: League, Player 1, Opponent, Venue, Prop, Line, Player 2, Combo
Step 7: Player 2 search input visible with data-testid='combo-player2-search'
Step 8: Selecting Player 2 transitions to Step 8 of 8 with Combo Stack summary card
Step 8: Shows both player names with teams (Alyssa Paola Thompson + Esme Beth Morgan)
Step 8: Shows 'Set Combined Line' input with +/- buttons
Step 8: Shows 'Generate Combo Projection' button with data-testid='generate-combo-btn'
Back button: From Step 7 cancels combo mode and returns to Step 6 of 6
critical_code_review_comments: Combo feature implementation is complete with proper state management
8-step breadcrumb correctly shows: League, Player 1, Opponent, Venue, Prop, Line, Player 2, Combo
Back button properly cancels combo mode and resets to 6-step flow
All data-testid attributes are properly set for testing

test_credentials.owner_email: josselj001@gmail.com (auto-login via verify-whop, no password needed)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Combo/Stack prediction feature fully tested. The feature adds Steps 7-8 to the wizard when user clicks 'Stack 2nd Player (Combo)' button on Step 6. Step 7 allows searching for a 2nd player, Step 8 shows combo summary with both players and combined line input. Back button from Step 7 cancels combo mode. Note: Actual prediction generation was NOT tested (takes 35-45 seconds and may timeout). Only UI navigation and state transitions were verified.

owner_bypass_login.description: Email josselj001@gmail.com bypasses password and goes straight to dashboard

combo_stack_feature.description: New 8-step combo flow for stacking 2 players

back_button_cancels_combo.description: Back button from Step 7 cancels combo mode and returns to Step 6 of 6

not_tested.actual_prediction_generation: Skipped - takes 35-45 seconds and may timeout. Only UI navigation tested.
not_tested.matchup_overview_real_data: Backend fix for matchupOverview with real API-Sports data not tested (requires running actual prediction)
